channel.title: CIOB Jobs – Jobs in Building and Construction
channel.description: The Official Job Board for the Chartered Institute of Building

item.title: Senior Project Manager – Major Infrastructure
item.dc:creator: ciobjobs
item.description: An exciting opportunity for a Senior Project Manager.
item.content:encoded:
Location: London, UK

Salary: £70,000 – £85,000 per annum

Employer: ABC Infrastructure Ltd

We are seeking an experienced Senior Project Manager to lead major infrastructure projects across the UK. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in construction project management, delivering large-scale projects on time and within budget.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Lead and manage project teams
  • Deliver projects to time, cost and quality
  • Stakeholder management at board level

item.title: Quantity Surveyor – Commercial Buildings
item.dc:creator: ciobjobs
item.description: Quantity Surveyor required for commercial building projects.
item.content:encoded:
Location: Manchester

Salary: £45,000 – £55,000

Employer: XYZ Construction Group

We are looking for an experienced Quantity Surveyor to join our commercial buildings division in Manchester.

item.title: Project Director – Built Environment
item.dc:creator: ciobjobs
item.description: Project Director position in the built environment sector.
item.content:encoded: Senior leadership role for an experienced Project Director.
